title: Create workout template shell with Volume Calculator ON
description: Verifies a coach can log in from /, navigate to Workout Templates, start a new template, and save basic details with Volume Calculator enabled.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation

title: Start Create New template and fill required metadata
description: Verifies the Create New template screen accepts name/description, Volume Calculator can be turned on, and optional fields can be selected if present.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation

title: Save template with name, description, and Volume Calculator enabled
description: Verifies saving a template succeeds and the detail page shows the new template name.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Type "All block types" into the description field
Click the "Volume Calculator" toggle to turn it ON
Verify text "TS Full Blocks Test" is visible

title: Add Straight Set block with 2 sets and filled fields
description: Verifies a Straight Set block can be added and configured with an exercise and two sets (reps/weight/rest if present).
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Click "Straight Set" in the block type picker

title: Add Superset block with 2 exercises and 2 sets
description: Verifies a Superset block can be added and shows two exercise slots and set fields for configuration.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Click "Superset" in the block type picker

title: Add Giant Set block with 3 exercises and 2 sets
description: Verifies a Giant Set block can be added and shows three exercise slots and set fields for configuration.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Click "Giant Set" in the block type picker

title: Add advanced intensity blocks (Drop, Cluster, Rest-Pause, Pre-Exhaustion) if available
description: Verifies the UI offers advanced block types and each selected block renders its configuration section; missing types are treated as absence in UI.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field

title: Add time-based blocks (AMRAP, EMOM, For Time, Tabata) from Time-Based section if available
description: Verifies time-based block options are accessible and selecting one displays time/interval inputs where present.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Click "Time-Based" in the block type picker

title: Add HR Sets block and select a heart rate zone if available
description: Verifies an HR Sets block can be added and displays a selectable heart rate zone field when present.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation
Type "TS Full Blocks Test" into the template name field
Click "HR Sets" in the block type picker

title: Validation: cannot save template without a name
description: Verifies the template cannot be saved when the name is missing and a visible validation message or disabled save state is shown.
category: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types

steps.description: Click the side menu button to open navigation

title: Cancel edit after changing reps and verify value does not persist
description: Changes reps but exits without saving and confirms the original reps value is retained when reopening.
category: Flow 2: Edit Existing Template — Change Values and Verify Persistence

steps.description: Click the first template in the list
Scroll to a block section that contains a reps input
Click into the reps input field
Type "88" into the reps input field
Verify text "88" is not visible in the reps input field

title: Save with high numeric reps value and confirm it persists (stress within UI limits)
description: Updates reps to a large value and verifies the app accepts it and persists it after reopening.
category: Flow 2: Edit Existing Template — Change Values and Verify Persistence

steps.description: Click the first template in the list
Scroll to a block section that contains a reps input
Click into the reps input field
Type "999" into the reps input field
Click "Edit Template" again for the same template
Verify text "999" is visible in the reps input field

title: Verify template editor loads with non-empty template name before editing reps
description: Confirms the edit screen is correctly populated (template name present) to avoid editing a blank/failed-load state.
category: Flow 2: Edit Existing Template — Change Values and Verify Persistence

steps.description: Click the first template in the list
Verify the template name field is visible
Verify text is visible in the template name field

title: Edit reps to 99, refresh by returning to templates list, then reopen and verify persistence
description: Saves reps=99 and verifies persistence after leaving the editor and returning via the templates list navigation path.
category: Flow 2: Edit Existing Template — Change Values and Verify Persistence

steps.description: Click the first template in the list
Scroll to a block section that contains a reps input
Click into the reps input field
Type "99" into the reps input field
Click "Workout Templates" breadcrumb or "Back to Templates"
Click the same first template in the list
Verify text "99" is visible in the reps input field

title: Create a new 4-week program from coach dashboard entry point
description: Verifies a coach can start program creation from Training and reach the program creation screen.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button

title: Fill Basic Info for TS 4-Week Program with 4-week duration
description: Verifies a coach can enter program name/description and set duration to 4 weeks on the Basic Info tab.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Type "TS 4-Week Program" into the program name field
Type "Schedule and progression test" into the program description field

title: Schedule Week 1: assign templates to Monday, Wednesday, Friday and leave other days as Rest Day
description: Verifies Week 1 scheduling supports assigning templates on specific weekdays and leaving remaining days as Rest Day.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Select a workout template from the template picker for Monday
Select a workout template from the template picker for Wednesday
Select a workout template from the template picker for Friday

title: Schedule Week 2 (if supported): assign templates to Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri and leave other days Rest Day
description: Verifies Week 2 scheduling is accessible via a week selector and supports assigning templates for multiple days.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Click "Week 2" in the week selector list
Select a workout template from the template picker for Monday
Select a workout template from the template picker for Tuesday
Select a workout template from the template picker for Wednesday
Select a workout template from the template picker for Friday

title: Week 2 selector missing: verify schedule UI does not allow switching weeks (record limitation)
description: Verifies behavior when no week selector exists by confirming only Week 1 is available/visible in the Schedule tab.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button

title: Progression Rules tab present: set basic weight and/or reps progression
description: Verifies the Progression Rules tab supports setting progression values when the tab is available and populated.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Type "5" into the weight progression field
Type "1" into the reps progression field

title: Progression Rules tab missing/empty: verify no configurable progression is shown (record limitation)
description: Verifies behavior when progression rules are not configurable by confirming the tab or expected controls are not visible.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Verify text "Progression Rules" is not visible
Verify text "Weight progression" is not visible

title: Save program and verify program detail shows TS 4-Week Program
description: Verifies a coach can save the configured program and see the correct program name on the resulting detail page.
category: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule

steps.description: Click the "Create New" or "+" program button
Type "TS 4-Week Program" into the program name field
Type "Schedule and progression test" into the program description field

title: Edit an existing program schedule and verify the change persists after reopening
description: Opens an existing program, edits one schedule day, saves, and verifies the updated day persists when reopening the edit screen.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list
Verify at least one day shows an assigned workout template name (not all days show "Rest Day")
Click on one day in the schedule that currently shows a workout template name
Click the "Back" or "Programs" navigation to return to the programs list
Click on the same program opened earlier in this test
Verify the previously changed day now shows "Rest Day"

title: Schedule tab shows persisted assigned templates (not all Rest Day) for an existing program
description: Verifies that an existing program has at least one scheduled day with an assigned template visible on the Schedule tab.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list
Verify at least one day shows an assigned workout template name (not all days show "Rest Day")

title: Change a scheduled day from Rest Day to a workout template and verify persistence
description: Updates a schedule day from Rest Day to a template and verifies the selected template remains after reopening the program edit screen.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list
Click on one day in the schedule that currently shows "Rest Day"
Select the first available workout template option (a non-"Rest Day" option) for that day
Click the "Back" or "Programs" navigation to return to the programs list
Click on the same program opened earlier in this test
Verify the previously changed day now shows the selected workout template name (not "Rest Day")

title: Attempt to save schedule without changes and confirm no error state is shown
description: Ensures saving an unchanged schedule does not show visible errors and the user remains on the edit experience.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list

title: Cancel/leave edit program without saving and confirm the schedule did not change after reopening
description: Edits a schedule day but leaves the edit screen without saving, then reopens to confirm the original value remains.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list
Click on one day in the schedule that currently shows a workout template name
Verify the day shows a workout template name (not "Rest Day")
Click the "Back" button to leave the edit screen
Click on the same program opened earlier in this test
Verify the previously edited day still shows a workout template name (not "Rest Day")

title: Save a schedule change and verify it is reflected after a full page reload of the programs page
description: Confirms that a saved schedule change is persisted beyond client-side navigation by reloading and reopening the program edit screen.
category: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify

steps.description: Click on the first visible program in the programs list
Click on one day in the schedule that currently shows a workout template name
Click the "Back" or "Programs" navigation to return to the programs list
Click on the same program opened earlier in this test
Verify the previously changed day now shows "Rest Day"

title: Assign a workout template to a client (basic happy path)
description: Verifies a coach can assign any available workout template to a client and sees confirmation plus the assignment in the client hub.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Click on any available workout template in the template chooser
Verify the newly assigned workout is visible in the upcoming/assignments area

title: Assign a workout with a specific scheduled date
description: Verifies the optional date field can be set during assignment and the scheduled assignment appears for the client.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Click on any available workout template in the template chooser
Verify text "2030-01-15" is visible in the upcoming/assignments area

title: Cancel out of the assign workout flow without creating an assignment
description: Verifies that backing out/canceling does not create an assignment for the client.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Verify the "Assign Workout" button is visible

title: Attempt to confirm assignment without selecting a template
description: Verifies the UI prevents confirming an assignment when no template is chosen and shows a validation message or disabled confirm state.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Verify text "Select a template" is visible

title: Verify assigned workout appears in the client hub assignments area after refresh navigation
description: Verifies that once assigned, the workout remains visible when returning to the client hub within the same session.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Click on any available workout template in the template chooser
Click on the same client in the clients list
Verify the assigned workout is visible in the upcoming/assignments area

title: Assign two different templates to the same client in one session
description: Verifies multiple assignments can be created sequentially and both appear in the assignments area.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

steps.description: Click on any client in the clients list
Click on any available workout template in the template chooser
Click on a different available workout template in the template chooser
Verify at least two assigned workouts are visible in the upcoming/assignments area

title: Invalid login prevents reaching coach clients and assignment flow
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials do not allow access to coach dashboard and therefore block assignment actions.
category: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client

title: Coach can log in from / and reach coach dashboard
description: Verifies that a coach can authenticate starting at / and land on the coach home area.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

title: Navigate from coach dashboard to Training area (programs list entry point)
description: Verifies the Training bottom navigation can be used to reach the coach programs area.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Training" in the bottom navigation

title: Open a program detail page from the programs list
description: Verifies a coach can reach some program detail view by selecting a program from the programs list.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Training" in the bottom navigation
Click on the first visible program in the programs list

title: Program detail: Assign/Assign Program control is discoverable (or explicitly absent)
description: Searches program detail tabs and sections for visible assignment controls such as Assign or Assign Program.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Training" in the bottom navigation
Click on the first visible program in the programs list

title: Program detail: Clients tab shows assignment-related controls (or explicitly absent)
description: Checks whether a program has a Clients tab/section that exposes assignment actions.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Training" in the bottom navigation
Click on the first visible program in the programs list

title: From client hub: Locate Assign Program controls across client tabs
description: Verifies that assignment controls can be found from the Clients area by opening a client hub and checking tabs/sections.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Clients" in the bottom navigation
Click on the first visible client in the clients list

title: Record missing: No program assignment controls found from Programs or Clients areas
description: If assignment controls are not present, verify the UI does not expose any Assign/Assign Program action in the searched areas.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature

steps.description: Click on "Training" in the bottom navigation
Click on "Clients" in the bottom navigation

title: Negative login: Invalid password prevents access to coach area
description: Verifies incorrect credentials do not allow entry into coach routes and an error is visible.
category: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature
